title: ceratospermum papposum
intro:
Ceratospermum papposum is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia, classified as a member of the family Annonaceae, known for its unique, yellowish-green fruit and seeds.

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ceratospermum papposum are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds are often dried and ground into powder, which can be used in traditional remedies or incorporated into modern supplements.
